description: Official PostQuantum.SqlCipher.Vault test vectors. See docs/test-vectors.md.

positive.name: kem-single-recipient
positive.description: Minimal well-formed manifest: one ML-KEM-768 recipient, ML-DSA-65 signed, revision 1.

negative.name: unknown-toplevel-field
negative.description: Adds top-level field 99 with a string value. Strict parser rejects unknown fields.

negative.name: duplicate-recipient-field
negative.description: Recipient map has duplicate key 1 (type) — rejected by canonical CBOR uniqueness enforcement before the application's explicit duplicate-key check runs.

negative.name: truncated-nonce
negative.description: Recipient nonce is 11 bytes instead of 12. Length is enforced exactly.

negative.name: wrong-salt-length
negative.description: Top-level database-salt is 15 bytes instead of 16.

negative.name: noncanonical-order
negative.description: Top-level map keys are not sorted (canonical CBOR violated).

negative.name: trailing-bytes
negative.description: Valid manifest with one extra 0x00 byte appended. Parser must reject trailing data.
